title: conocephalus papuanus
intro: Conocephalus papuanus, also known as the Papuan tussock grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Conocephalus. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Conocephalus papuanus include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Conocephalus papuanus is often prepared as an infusion or tea, and sometimes used in the form of a salve or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
